step_rationale: Atheroprotective lipids; reduced in proatherogenic lipidome; ACS biomarker and plaque vulnerability predictor.
mechanism: Plasmalogens are atheroprotective alkenylphospholipids whose depletion associates with atherosclerotic plaque instability and acute coronary syndrome.
